Request POS Demo Marketing X Get Started Book a Call Shopify SEO Agency Shopify SEO Agency for Shopify and Shopify Plus Brands We are a Shopify accredited SEO agency for Shopify and Shopify Plus brands. We improve collection and product visibility, fix technical SEO issues, and build authority so you grow revenue from organic search. Get in Touch The world’s most innovative brands 🤝 work with Ecomm Wizards Shopify SEO (Search Engine Optimization) optimization is absolutely fundamental for your store's success. By ensuring your website ranks as high as possible in search results, you significantly increase the probability that potential customers will find your store, browse your products, and ultimately make a purchase. This is the most direct way to boost organic traffic and, consequently, your revenue. Why Do You Need It? Good SEO works as a form of free advertising 70% of digital marketers see SEO as far more effective than paid advertising, as search engines can give a steady amount of organic traffic coming to a website naturally. With a PPC campaign meanwhile, you might only be getting people to visit your page as long as you have the budget to pay for the ads. Once the campaign ends, the store might stop being visible.

Visitors trust more pages ranking high in Google Google uses over 200 criteria to rank websites: content quality and originality to keywords, store’s speed, user experience, and so on. If your page ranks in the top Google search results, it tells the searchers the store is meeting the majority of the Google requirements – and makes them trust your store more.

SEO can be done on a budget Even if you’re on a limited budget, SEO can bring you benefits. Most of the things that can affect the SEO ranking can be done yourself and with little to no cost. While for more complicated issues you might need to hire an SEO specialist, the costs will still be far lower than if you wanted to, say, focus mostly on paid advertisement for bringing customers to the store.

A Shopify SEO agency improves how your Shopify store appears in organic search so you generate more high intent traffic and sales. That includes keyword and category strategy, collection and product page optimisation, technical SEO audits, indexation control, internal linking, structured data, and content planning. A specialist Shopify SEO agency also understands the platform constraints around URLs, collections, duplicate variants, filtering, and theme level changes, so improvements are implemented properly and safely.

Shopify SEO has platform specific considerations that affect rankings and crawl efficiency. These include collection hierarchy, internal linking across collections and products, duplicate URLs created by filtering and variants, canonical management, sitemap structure, and how your theme outputs structured data. A Shopify specialist builds strategies around these constraints so you can scale category visibility without creating thin pages, duplication issues, or wasted crawl budget.

Most Shopify brands see early positive signals within 4 to 8 weeks, such as improved crawlability, better indexation, and movement on secondary keywords. Meaningful commercial results typically build over 3 to 6 months, depending on competition, current technical health, and the amount of work delivered each month. The fastest gains usually come from fixing technical blockers and improving category and product page relevance, then scaling with content and authority building.

Our Shopify SEO services typically include technical audits and implementation support, keyword and category mapping, collection and product page optimisation, internal linking improvements, structured data reviews, content strategy and on page content upgrades, and digital PR direction to build authority. We prioritise work that drives ecommerce outcomes, not vanity metrics, and we align SEO activity to your margin, product ranges, and seasonality.

Yes. We work with both Shopify and Shopify Plus brands, including teams with international storefronts, large catalogues, and complex collection structures. Shopify Plus stores often need stronger technical foundations, clearer taxonomy planning, and more robust templates for collection and product content. Our developers and SEO strategists work together so SEO improvements are implemented cleanly within your theme and platform setup.

Success is measured by growth in qualified organic traffic and the revenue it drives, alongside leading indicators that predict long term performance. We track keyword visibility across commercial categories, organic landing page performance, indexation and crawl health, internal linking improvements, and category coverage. Reporting focuses on actions taken, impact achieved, and the next highest ROI priorities.

Auditing the store for SEO issues Conducting a comprehensive UX/SEO audit to identify precisely where the store is lagging in search rankings. This analysis points out the main culprits affecting your page position.

Discovering and fixing store speed issues Identifying elements that slow down the store and implementing solutions to accelerate loading times. Speed optimization is critical for achieving high positions in search results.
Optimizing store performance Improving the overall store performance by removing obstacles and fixing errors, ensuring smooth website operation, better user experience (UX), and higher SEO rankings.

Suggesting the right SEO tools for Shopify Recommending and implementing the best SEO apps and tools available on the Shopify platform (e.g., for image compression, adding schema markup) to effectively support long-term optimization efforts.
